title: CSS Grid: A Deep Dive
description: Stop fighting flexbox for two-dimensional layouts. Grid gives you rows AND columns at the same time, and once you internalize the line-based placement model, the rest is muscle memory.

lessons.title: grid-template-columns and fr units
lessons.content: fr distributes free space. 1fr 1fr 1fr is a three-column equal grid.

lessons.title: Line-based placement
lessons.content: grid-column: 1 / 3 means start at line 1, end before line 3.

lessons.title: Named areas
lessons.content: grid-template-areas turns your CSS into a wireframe.
